local.title: Mars Greenhouse Ops
local.blurb: Run a cheerful day in a Mars colony greenhouse while the agent finds the right console — 32 tools, 2 in context.

local.title: Pizza Shop Ops
local.blurb: Run the Friday rush without dropping a pie — Tool Search picks the station, approval gates the oven.

local.title: The Squad Room
local.blurb: A whole AI team (lead, researcher, builder) shares one governed Toolbox — each member, 2 tools in context.

cloud.title: Mars Greenhouse Ops — Cloud
cloud.blurb: The greenhouse agent deployed on Foundry — hero tools on Azure Container Apps, a real Toolbox, the model writes its own search live.

cloud.title: Pizza Shop Ops — Cloud
cloud.blurb: The Friday rush on a real Foundry Toolbox — one hosted endpoint, real ranking, the oven still gates on approval server-side.

cloud.title: The Squad Room — Cloud
cloud.blurb: A whole AI team on one deployed, governed Toolbox — three roles, three live searches, the release held for lead approval.

share.title: GitHub Copilot
share.blurb: Point GitHub Copilot at your Toolbox endpoint — same tool_search, same flat context, right inside the editor.

share.title: Claw
share.blurb: Bring your Toolbox to Claw — one shared endpoint, the agent discovers tools on demand.

share.title: Claude
share.blurb: Use your Toolbox from Claude over MCP — the box stays flat-cost no matter how many tools it holds.
